title: remote load of dir not supported
body:
we do not support loading an image from a directory with the remote client.  Error message has been added to ensure that is communicated to users clearly.  also added descriptions to Skips for tests.  updated documentation which didnt mention loading from a directory at all.

Fixes: #7723

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

@vrothberg @baude Looks like we might want to merge these together, since they are slightly different.
@vrothberg #7741 went in, so this one needs at least a rebase if not a bit more of a scrub.
Yes lets rebase this and at least get the documentation changes in the tests to say why they won't work on remote machines.
